problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: Combining Quantum annealing for optimization problems with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
